about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what do you want? -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Describe what you have in mind. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or links. -->
